note: X12 837/835 envelope + balancing lint (FORMAT-ONLY, FL-2). Vector 1: compliant 837. Vector 2: 835 balance mismatch (arithmetic). Vector 3: 835 interchange control-number mismatch.

vectors.name: compliant_837_claims
vectors.description: 837 claim transaction, envelope control numbers continuous, two well-formed claims.

output_payload.disambiguation: lint_x12_claim_records checks X12 837/835 ENVELOPE control-number continuity and, for 835, payment-amount balancing (arithmetic only) -- a FORMAT-ONLY validator over identifiers and amounts, never claim content.
output_payload.phi_note: This schema is structurally PHI-IMPOSSIBLE: it defines only envelope control numbers, claim/payment identifiers, and monetary amounts -- no patient name, DOB, diagnosis, or any clinical field exists in the input or output. See the HIPAA-Security WATCH row for the separate, un-triggered security-rule surface.
output_payload.subset_coverage_statement: This lints X12 837/835 ENVELOPE structure and 835 payment balancing only, from public CMS companion-guide summaries. It does not implement the full licensed X12 implementation guide, and defines no clinical/PHI fields whatsoever.
output_payload.table_source: CMS X12 837/835 Companion Guide public summaries (cms.gov); ASC X12 005010 envelope structure (public control-number continuity rules: ISA13/IEA02, GS06/GE02, ST02/SE02).
output_payload.regulatory_basis: ASC X12 005010 837/835 transaction sets; CMS companion-guide public summaries; HIPAA Administrative Simplification transaction-standard rule (45 CFR Part 162).

vectors.name: 835_balance_mismatch
vectors.description: 835 remittance total_paid_amount does not equal sum of claim_payments -- arithmetic balancing failure.

issues.message: Remittance total_paid_amount (300) does not equal sum of claim_payments (275).

vectors.name: 835_control_number_mismatch
vectors.description: 835 balances arithmetically but ISA13/IEA02 interchange control numbers diverge -- structural continuity failure.

issues.message: ISA13 (000000003) does not match IEA02 (000000099) -- interchange control-number continuity broken.
